q: We set up a tent in the clearing during our hiking trip.
a: During our hiking trip, we set up a tent in the clearing.

q: The nearest hospital is two blocks away according to the map.
a: According to the map, the nearest hospital is two blocks away.

q: I noticed beautiful orchids in bloom while walking through the garden.
a: While walking through the garden, I noticed beautiful orchids in bloom.

q: He began to read it under a streetlamp after purchasing the novel.
a: After purchasing the novel, he began to read it under a streetlamp.

q: We must reduce plastic waste to keep the environment clean.
a: To keep the environment clean, we must reduce plastic waste.

q: Emily accepted the award with a big smile on her face.
a: With a big smile on her face, Emily accepted the award.

q: The old band played the boy's tournament record again on the vinyl for the competition celebration.
a: During the competition celebration, the old band played the boy's tournament record again on the vinyl.

q: Our monitor should be a bit considerate towards his classmates to be a good leader.
a: To be a good leader, our monitor should be a bit considerate towards his classmates.

q: The chef prepared the guests, preparing the meal with great care.
a: Preparing the meal with great care, the chef served the guests. / Preparing the meal with great care, the chef served the guests.

q: I found my wallet in the living room after searching for an hour.
a: After searching for an hour, I found my wallet in the living room.

q: We walked through the forest, enjoying the fresh air.
a: Enjoying the fresh air, we walked through the forest.

q: The manager explained the strategy in a calm and steady voice.
a: In a calm and steady voice, the manager explained the strategy.

q: My uncle traveled to upper Myanmar for business during the last monsoon season.
a: During the last monsoon season, my uncle traveled to upper Myanmar for business.

q: The athlete completed the race even though he had an injured foot.
a: Despite having an injured foot, the athlete completed the race.

q: The teacher watched her students quietly from the back of the room.
a: From the back of the room, the teacher watched her students quietly.

q: We reached the bus stop just in time to catch the last bus.
a: To catch the last bus, we reached the bus stop just in time.

q: Aye Aye volunteered to clean the classroom without being asked.
a: Without being asked, Aye Aye volunteered to clean the classroom.

q: The visitors were amazed by the view when they reached the mountain top.
a: When they reached the mountain top, the visitors were amazed by the view.

q: Ko Ko entered the hall while everyone was already seated.
a: While everyone was already seated, Ko Ko entered the hall.

q: The woman picked up the crying baby and gently held it close.
a: Gently holding it close, the woman picked up the crying baby.

q: The cat jumped onto the table and knocked over the vase.
a: Leaping onto the table, the cat knocked over the vase. / Jumping onto the table, the cat knocked over the vase.

q: The audience applauded loudly as the play came to an end.
a: As the play came to an end, the audience applauded loudly.

q: The technician checked the system thoroughly before restarting it.
a: Before restarting it, the technician checked the system thoroughly.

q: He wrote the email, stating all the reasons for his complaint.
a: To address the reasons for his complaint, he wrote the email. / Stating all the reasons for his complaint, he wrote the email.

q: The children ran through the yard, laughing joyfully.
a: Laughing joyfully, the children ran through the yard.

q: The customer paid the bill and walked out of the shop.
a: After paying the bill, the customer walked out of the shop.

q: The student submitted his essay just before the deadline.
a: Before the deadline, the student submitted his essay.

q: The librarian arranged the books carefully on the shelves.
a: Carefully and patiently, the librarian arranged the books on the shelves.

q: The artist painted a landscape inspired by the morning light.
a: Inspired by the morning light, the artist painted a landscape.

q: We took photos during our visit to the ancient temple.
a: During our visit to the ancient temple, we took photos.

q: The new teacher introduced herself politely to the parents.
a: Politely and confidently, the new teacher introduced herself to the parents.

q: The couple strolled along the lake, enjoying the evening breeze.
a: Enjoying the evening breeze, the couple strolled along the lake.

q: The workers continued their task without taking a break.
a: Without taking a break, the workers continued their task.

q: He repaired the broken chair using only basic tools.
a: Using only basic tools, he repaired the broken chair.

q: The author signed her books for the readers after the talk.
a: After the talk, the author signed her books for the readers.

q: She rewrote her entire thesis to address the supervisor's feedback more clearly.
a: To address the supervisor's feedback more clearly, she rewrote her entire thesis.

q: He walked into the boardroom, holding a stack of financial reports.
a: Holding a stack of financial reports, he walked into the boardroom.

q: We extended our trip to include a visit to several historical landmarks.
a: To include a visit to several historical landmarks, we extended our trip.

q: The teacher spoke with confidence after preparing all night for the seminar.
a: After preparing all night for the seminar, the teacher spoke with confidence.

q: She carefully examined the device before attempting to repair it.
a: Before attempting to repair it, she carefully examined the device.

q: He completed the assignment on time despite struggling with the new topic.
a: Despite struggling with the new topic, he completed the assignment on time.

q: I opened the file, noticing an unexpected error in the final paragraph.
a: Noticing an unexpected error in the final paragraph, I opened the file.

q: They renovated the building to meet modern safety standards.
a: To meet modern safety standards, they renovated the building.

q: The team agreed on the final timeline after reviewing the schedule.
a: After reviewing the schedule, the team agreed on the final timeline.

q: She avoided eye contact, feeling nervous about the interview.
a: Feeling nervous about the interview, she avoided eye contact.
